description_long: This is a large, industrial-grade refrigerated shipping container, commonly known as a reefer container, used for transporting temperature-sensitive goods. The exterior is primarily white with visible branding from Maersk, including a large blue star logo and the company name on both long sides. The front end features a refrigeration unit with vents, control panels, and various technical markings, while the rear end has double doors with locking mechanisms and additional safety and identification labels. The container's surface shows signs of wear, such as rust streaks and scuff marks, indicating heavy use in shipping environments. The structure is made of corrugated metal panels for strength and insulation, with reinforced corners for stacking and transport. This type of container is typically found in ports, shipping yards, or on transport vehicles in urban and industrial settings.
description: A large white Maersk-branded refrigerated shipping container with a refrigeration unit on one end, double doors on the other, and visible signs of wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the refrigeration unit, vents, control panels, and technical markings.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the large Maersk logo and blue star, with visible rust and wear.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring double doors with locking bars, safety labels, and Maersk logos.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the Maersk logo and similar wear patterns as the other side.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: large printed Maersk logo and star on both sides, technical and safety labels on front and rear
attribute_handles_or_grips: vertical locking bars with integrated handles on rear doors
attribute_placement_location: outdoor ground, shipping yard, or on transport vehicles
